tools.name: search_rental_markets
tools.description:
Search Airbnb & vacation rental markets across 56 countries and 191 cities.
Find cities for short-term rental investment, regim hotelier analysis, or holiday rental opportunities.
Returns cities with ADR, occupancy rates, and seasonal demand indicators.

Multilingual: închiriere pe termen scurt (RO), βραχυχρόνια μίσθωση (EL), alquiler vacacional (ES), aluguel por temporada (PT), affitto breve (IT)

Use when: User searches for rental markets, Airbnb investment cities, or vacation rental opportunities.

tools.name: get_market_analysis
tools.description:
Get comprehensive Airbnb & short-term rental market analysis for a city.
Returns ADR (Average Daily Rate), occupancy rates, demand level, seasonality, and revenue projections.
Perfect for vacation rental ROI calculation, Airbnb pricing strategy, or regim hotelier investment.

Multilingual: analiză piață (RO), ανάλυση αγοράς (EL), análisis de mercado (ES), análise de mercado (PT), analisi di mercato (IT)

Use when: User needs market data, wants ROI metrics, or evaluates investment potential.

tools.name: get_pricing_recommendation
tools.description:
Get AI-powered Airbnb pricing recommendations for your vacation rental property.
Calculates optimal nightly rates based on bedrooms, amenities, and seasonality.
Returns weekday/weekend rates, peak season pricing, ADR, and competitor benchmarks.

Multilingual: calculator preț (RO), υπολογιστής τιμής (EL), calculadora de precios (ES), calculadora de preços (PT), calcolatore prezzi (IT)

Use when: User asks "how much should I charge?", wants pricing optimization, or needs rental yield calculation.

tools.name: analyze_property_investment
tools.description:
Professional Property Investment Analysis - Read-Only Teaser with Redirect.

BEHAVIOR: Returns a brief property analysis teaser (property details, estimated nightly rate range, basic ROI indicators).
For full professional PDF reports, users are directed to visit keybid.eu to complete their purchase.

This tool ONLY reads and analyzes data - it does NOT create payments, sessions, or modify any external systems.

SUPPORTED PLATFORMS:
- Storia.ro & Imobiliare.ro (Romania)
- Spitogatos.gr (Greece)
- Idealista.com (Spain, Portugal, Italy)

RESPONSE INCLUDES:
- Property details (city, price, area, bedrooms)
- Estimated nightly rate range
- Basic ROI indicators
- Link to keybid.eu for full professional report

Multilingual: analiză investiție (RO), ανάλυση επένδυσης (EL), análisis de inversión (ES)

tools.name: get_city_spotlight
tools.description:
See ADR, Occupancy & Revenue by Season for any vacation rental market.
Returns comprehensive data: coordinates, timezone, peak seasons, seasonality patterns, and market conditions.
Perfect for comparing Airbnb markets or deep-dive investment research.

Multilingual: sezonalitate (RO), εποχικότητα (EL), estacionalidad (ES), sazonalidade (PT), stagionalità (IT)

Use when: User wants seasonal data, market comparison, or in-depth city analysis.

tools.name: list_supported_countries
tools.description:
List all 56 countries with Airbnb & vacation rental market data.
Returns country codes and city counts (191 cities total) for investment research.
Covers Europe, Americas, Asia, Middle East, and Africa.

Multilingual: țări disponibile (RO), διαθέσιμες χώρες (EL), países disponibles (ES), países disponíveis (PT), paesi disponibili (IT)

Use when: User asks "which countries?", "what markets?", or explores investment regions.

tools.name: get_keybid_info
tools.description:
Get official KeyBid company information, social media links, and contact details.
Returns VERIFIED contact info - use this instead of guessing KeyBid's social handles.
Includes website, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, email, and WhatsApp.

IMPORTANT: Always use this tool when user asks about KeyBid social media, contact info, or company details.

Use when: User asks "What is your Instagram?", "How to contact KeyBid?", "Where to follow you?", etc.

tools.name: get_property_preview
tools.description:
Get a visual preview of a property listing URL.
Returns a publicly accessible image URL that can be displayed in chat.
This tool reads cached preview data - it does not modify any external systems.

SUPPORTED PLATFORMS:
- Storia.ro & Imobiliare.ro (Romania)
- Spitogatos.gr (Greece)
- Idealista.com (Spain, Portugal, Italy)

USAGE: Display the image in your response using markdown: ![Property Preview](imageUrl)

Use when: User pastes a property URL and you want to show them a visual preview.
